title: In the Realm of the Senses
posterAlt: In the Realm of the Senses (1976) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A passionate telling of the story of Sada Abe, a woman whose affair with her master led to an obsessive and ultimately destructive sexual relationship.
synopsis: Released in 1976, In the Realm of the Senses is a drama and romance film from France and Japan. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a NC-17 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
